overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person perspective walk through a rainy, neon-lit urban downtown. The character starts on an elevated balcony overlooking a busy intersection, then descends to street level and walks through wet streets with heavy pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated balcony overlooking a busy intersection, observing traffic and neon signs below

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'Set Sail' advertisement with neon pink and blue lighting
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows
row of palm trees lining the distant street
multi-lane street intersection visible from above with moving traffic
metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on an elevated pedestrian balcony overlooking a rain-soaked cyberpunk intersection. Neon billboards glow brightly against the darkening sky, particularly the prominent 'Set Sail' advertisement on the right. The camera moves slowly along the balcony, looking down at the wet streets and moving traffic below, sheltered from the heavy rain by the overhang above.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending ramp from elevated walkway to street level

events.description: turning away from balcony railing and entering descending ramp to street level

agents.ego_description: walking down a ramp from the elevated walkway toward street level, passing a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing blue umbrella walking up the ramp in the opposite direction

entered.detail: concrete ramp with metal railings leading down to street level
dark building facade with neon green signage

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and enters a descending ramp, transitioning from the sheltered balcony to the exposed street level. A pedestrian with a distinctive glowing blue umbrella passes by going uphill. The perspective shifts from elevated overview to approaching street level, with the wet pavement and neon reflections becoming more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban street with crosswalks and neon advertising

events.description: crossing a yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk with other pedestrians
turning left to follow the sidewalk along the main thoroughfare

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet city streets, crossing intersections with other pedestrians, and walking along neon-lit sidewalks

notable_agents.action: black sports car with gold rims driving past on the wet street
pedestrian with red umbrella crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: rain-soaked black asphalt reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
large building facade covered in multiple glowing digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the character walks through the rain-soaked urban environment, crossing yellow-striped crosswalks surrounded by towering digital billboards and neon signage. The wet pavement creates vivid reflections of the pink, green, and blue neon lights. Other pedestrians with umbrellas share the crosswalks, while sports cars drive past on the multi-lane road. The atmosphere is dense with cyberpunk aesthetic—palm trees line the street against a backdrop of glass skyscrapers and massive advertising screens.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent from a sheltered elevated balcony into the heart of a rain-drenched, neon-lit cyberpunk intersection. It begins by gliding along a high pedestrian walkway, looking down at the wet streets and glowing billboards like the prominent Set Sail advertisement while remaining protected from the heavy rain. As the camera turns left and enters a descending ramp, the perspective shifts from an elevated overview to the exposed street level, passing a pedestrian with a glowing blue umbrella. The scene then opens into the dense urban environment at ground level, where the camera crosses yellow-striped crosswalks amidst vivid pink and blue reflections on the wet pavement. Finally, the movement continues through a crowd of umbrella-carrying pedestrians and passing sports cars, framed by towering glass skyscrapers and neon-lit palm trees.
